C-CONTEXT-TUI-PLUGIN.IntentSummary: Implement the approved context TUI plugin as a modern OpenCode 1.18.2 TUI module, keep analysis mostly pure and testable, register it through conservative tui.json mutation, and synchronize public and GRACE contracts.

TargetAssertions.MustPassCommand: bun test src/tui/context/analyze.test.ts src/tui/context/plugin.test.ts src/lib/opencode.test.ts src/lib/plugin-toggle-config.test.ts src/commands/launch.test.ts

T-001.Title: Upgrade and configure the TUI build surface
T-001.AcceptanceCriteria: OpenCode plugin/SDK dependencies target 1.18.2, OpenTUI compile-time dependencies and peer contracts are present, TSX compiles, and package exports expose ./tui without breaking existing exports.
T-001.Verification: bun install; bun run typecheck; bun run build

T-002.Title: Implement pure context analysis
T-002.AcceptanceCriteria: Pure functions derive measured usage, active post-compaction messages, approximate categories, unknown context, drift, model metadata, and MCP summary from bounded inputs.

T-003.Title: Implement and register the context TUI dialog
T-003.AcceptanceCriteria: The modern keymap command registers slashName context, collects SDK/state data safely, respects the context toggle, and renders an xlarge measured-versus-estimated dialog with warnings and MCP status.
T-003.Verification: bun test src/tui/context/plugin.test.ts; bun run typecheck

T-004.Title: Manage TUI configuration conservatively
T-004.AcceptanceCriteria: Path resolution includes dedicated tui.json(c), mutation preserves unrelated JSONC settings and tuple options, install/sync/init register the subpath idempotently, inspection reports failures, and launch pins an existing project-managed TUI config.
T-004.Verification: bun test src/lib/opencode.test.ts src/lib/config-layers.test.ts src/commands/sync.test.ts src/commands/launch.test.ts src/commands/status.test.ts src/commands/doctor.test.ts

T-005.Title: Synchronize plugin toggles, docs, graph, and verification
T-005.AcceptanceCriteria: The context toggle defaults on, public docs explain /context accuracy and setup, and GRACE requirements/technology/deployment/graph/verification own the new behavior and tests.

T-006.Title: Run package and repository gates
T-006.AcceptanceCriteria: Targeted tests and the repository/package gates pass freshly; the final diff contains only approved scope and generated dist remains unedited.
T-006.Verification: bun run check; bun run build; bun run pack:check; bunx @osovv/grace-cli@rc status --path .; git diff --check
